chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1218 of 2018 CP D 145 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.15825/2018 3. For hearing of main case 28.03.2025 Mr. Ijaz Ahmed Zahid, advocates for the petitioner Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Ms. Zakia advocate holds brief for Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for respondent Ms. Afsheen Aman, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General These petitions assail show cause notices. Per learned counsel the same are unwarranted in view of Division Bench judgment of this Court reported as 2023 PTD 527. Per learned counsel, show cause notices have been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petitions be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
